title: Lorekeeper
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:NightsisterLorekeeper-AoD.jpg|thumb|right|200px|A Nightsister lorekeeper]]
"'''Lorekeeper'''" was the term used by the [[Amani/Legends|Amani]] to describe their tribal leaders, or shamans. It was these individuals in their society that kept tales of historical struggles to relate at special events.

The title was also applied to other, non-Amani beings that the species deemed wise. The [[Nightsisters/Legends|Nightsisters]] of [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]] also had a lorekeeper who kept all the secrets of past generations.

==Sources==
